# Dr. Nisarg Parmar — neurosurgeon (Surat & Ahmedabad, Gujarat)

Official practice information: NIMHANS-trained neurosurgeon; brain and spine surgery; emergency neurosurgery.

## How to crawl
Use the site’s canonical domain from the live deployment. Key paths:
- / — Home
- /neurosurgeon-in-surat — Neurosurgeon in Surat, Gujarat
- /neurosurgeon-in-ahmedabad — Neurosurgeon in Ahmedabad
- /about — Credentials and background
- /specialties — Clinical specialties
- /contact — Locations and contact
- /appointments — Booking
- /blog — Patient-facing articles
- /sitemap.xml — All indexable URLs
- /feed.xml — RSS feed for the blog

## Medical disclaimer
Web content is educational; it is not a substitute for in-person medical advice or emergency care.
